title: National Taiwan University AI Policy Evidence Draft - 2026-05-12
summary: Staged crawl for National Taiwan University found official Traditional Chinese evidence on central teaching/assessment guidance, DFLL student AI-use rules, Health Policy and Management AI-use conduct rules, and Social Work journal publication-ethics rules. Claims remain non-canonical staged candidates and are not human reviewed.
limitations: Firecrawl search was attempted first but failed because no credits remained; fallback search and official-domain HTTP fetches were used for this staged run.
This draft is based only on publicly accessible official NTU sources fetched on 2026-05-12; login-gated or internal material was not accessed.
This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The staged claims are not canonical public claims and have not been human reviewed.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
